description: Labeled retrieval eval set (DESIGN.md Section 9.4). Each query names the corpus file that contains the answer; the runner resolves filenames to document ids at upload time.

queries.query: How many days of paid time off do employees get per year?
How many days per week can I work remotely?
How long is parental leave and is it paid?
What is the minimum password length?
How quickly must a suspected security incident be reported?
Is multi-factor authentication required for production access?
What equipment do new hires receive before starting?
Who is my onboarding buddy and what do they do?
What is the daily meal per diem when traveling for business?
Above what amount do expenses require a receipt?
